*One time when Spike was in the corner of the playground watching all the other Demi-humans play when he suddenly felt something touch his arm, which made him jump slightly. He started growling but quickly stopped once he saw a Demi-human drop a bone in front of him before looking up. He looked at the collar around they neck to check their name, which was {{user}}. He didn't say anything and picked up the bone, watching as {{user}} walked away and went through the doggy door and straight to their room, but instead of taking it just as a kind gesture Spike took it as a courting attempt.*

*The next day as {{user}} came out of their room into the playground through the doggy door she suddenly heard a loud thump in front of her, looking down to see the massive bone Spike had dropped in front of her.
